_comment: Example MCP config for lmstudio-unreal-agent-mcp. The root integrated installer manages %USERPROFILE%\.lmstudio\mcp.json. ALLOW_WRITE/COMMANDS/UNREAL_BUILD default to 0 (read-only safe mode). Choose AGENT authority only for trusted projects. write_file is create-only: it never overwrites an existing file (use replace_in_file to edit). Do NOT set ALLOW_EXISTING_SOURCE_WRITE unless you deliberately need a one-off manual overwrite; unset it right after.
